form.formComment: Resuming today after three months. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Market Rasen January 16 over 4800m. Previously first up; 3 of 9 starters at Ascot November 21 over 4800m, 7 len behind Montregard carrying 71kg at $4.50. Can bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9). Resuming today after three months. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Market Rasen January 16 over 4800m. Previously first up; 3 of 9 starters at Ascot November 21 over 4800m, 7 len behind Montregard carrying 71kg at $4.50. Can bounce back.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Last run didn't finish the race at Uttoxeter on March 28 over 4800m. The start before that; finished fifth of 11 starters at Bangor-On-Dee on February 25 over 5900m, slow track; 46 len behind Planned Paradise carrying 70.5kg at $12. Has the ability to be in the finish. Cannot be written off.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8). Useful gelding. Last run didn't finish the race at Uttoxeter on March 28 over 4800m. The start before that; finished fifth of 11 starters at Bangor-On-Dee on February 25 over 5900m, slow track; 46 len behind Planned Paradise carrying 70.5kg at $12. Has the ability to be in the finish. Cannot be written off.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Not raced for 45 days. Fresh up after two months finished third of 8 runners at Wetherby on February 26 over 4840m, slow track; 11 len behind Bo Cruz carrying 76kg at $2.50. Previously second-up fell at Uttoxeter on December 19 over 4800m. Key runner who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4.5). Having second run back today. Not raced for 45 days. Fresh up after two months finished third of 8 runners at Wetherby on February 26 over 4840m, slow track; 11 len behind Bo Cruz carrying 76kg at $2.50. Previously second-up fell at Uttoxeter on December 19 over 4800m. Key runner who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last run finished second of 7 starters at Hereford on March 18 over 5000m, 3 len behind Edgewell carrying 76kg at $5. Run before finished sixth of 16 runners at Chepstow on January 27 over 4700m, on slow going 44 len behind Fat Faced Columbo carrying 71.5kg at $21. Gets a chance to win. Strong top-three claims again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8). Last run finished second of 7 starters at Hereford on March 18 over 5000m, 3 len behind Edgewell carrying 76kg at $5. Run before finished sixth of 16 runners at Chepstow on January 27 over 4700m, on slow going 44 len behind Fat Faced Columbo carrying 71.5kg at $21. Gets a chance to win. Strong top-three claims again.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Last outing finished eighth of 10 starters at Chepstow on March 26 over 4700m, 24 len behind Moor End with 74kg at $9. At only start last preparation pulled up at Lingfield on January 19 over 4700m. First up effort suggests unlikely to be winning.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Second-up today. Last outing finished eighth of 10 starters at Chepstow on March 26 over 4700m, 24 len behind Moor End with 74kg at $9. At only start last preparation pulled up at Lingfield on January 19 over 4700m. First up effort suggests unlikely to be winning.

form.formComment: Last outing finished sixth of 10 starters at Chepstow on March 26 over 4700m, 15 len behind Moor End with 76kg at $101. The start before that; pulled up at Leicester on March 6 over 4500m. Struggling and needs to do more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Last outing finished sixth of 10 starters at Chepstow on March 26 over 4700m, 15 len behind Moor End with 76kg at $101. The start before that; pulled up at Leicester on March 6 over 4500m. Struggling and needs to do more.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after three months finished second of 10 starters at Chepstow on March 26 over 4700m, a nose behind Moor End carrying 73.5kg at $9.50. Previously second-up ran on from midfield; finished third in a small field at Bangor-On-Dee on November 29 over 4600m, on slow going 14 len behind Be The Difference carrying 68.5kg at $1.70. Fitter and expected to go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Having second run back today. Fresh up after three months finished second of 10 starters at Chepstow on March 26 over 4700m, a nose behind Moor End carrying 73.5kg at $9.50. Previously second-up ran on from midfield; finished third in a small field at Bangor-On-Dee on November 29 over 4600m, on slow going 14 len behind Be The Difference carrying 68.5kg at $1.70. Fitter and expected to go on with it.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Freshened for 37 days. Last start pulled up at Leicester on March 6 over 4000m. Run before held ground to the line finished third of 7 starters at this track on February 20 over 4800m, on heavy track; 10 len behind River Voyage with 73.5kg at $2.50. Gets a chance to win. Recent run worth forgiving.
